info.title: DynTube API
info.description:
The DynTube API allows you to programmatically upload, manage, and deliver video content.

## Authentication

All API requests require authentication using a Bearer token. Include your API key in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

You can obtain your API key from the [DynTube Dashboard](https://app.dyntube.com/settings/api).

## Base URLs

DynTube uses different base URLs for different API operations:

| Service | Base URL |
|---------|----------|
| Main API | `https://api.dyntube.com/v1` |
| Video Upload | `https://upload.dyntube.com/v1` |
| Analytics | `https://stats.dyntube.com/v1` |

## Rate Limiting

API requests are rate limited. If you exceed this limit, you'll receive a `429 Too Many Requests` response.

## Region Codes

DynTube supports multiple regions. Use the appropriate region code based on your plan type.

### Region Codes for Standard Plans

| Region Name | Code |
|-------------|------|
| US East | `use-s` |
| US West | `usw-s` |
| US Central | `usc-s` |
| Canada | `can-s` |
| Netherlands | `euc-s` |
| Germany | `deu-s` |
| France | `fra-s` |
| United Kingdom | `gbr-s` |
| Singapore | `sgp-s` |
| Australia | `aus-s` |
| Japan | `apn-s` |

### Region Codes for Live Streaming

| Region Name | Code |
|-------------|------|
| US East | `use` |
| Europe | `euc` |
| Singapore | `sgp` |
| India | `ind` |

## Plan Types

When creating projects or uploading videos, you need to specify a `planType`:

- `1` - Standard Plan
- `2` - Edge Plan

tags.name: Videos
tags.description: Upload, manage, and retrieve video content

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Organize videos into projects with transcoding settings

get.description:
Get a list of videos with optional filtering and sorting.

**Note:** This API is rate limited and not optimized for real-time usage.
We recommend fetching video links and storing them in your database.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order (e.g., 'Created:-1' for descending, 'Created:1' for ascending)

post.description:
Upload a video by providing a URL to the video file.

**Important:** This endpoint uses `https://upload.dyntube.com/v1` as the base URL (not api.dyntube.com).

The content type should be `multipart/form-data`.

url.description: URL of the video file to upload

tags.description: Video tags (can be specified multiple times)

get.description:
Retrieve details of a specific video by ID.

**Note:** This is NOT the same as `channelKey` in the embed code.
Use the video ID from the dashboard or video list API.

put.description: Update video metadata and player options

get.description:
Check the transcoding status of a video.

### Status Values
- `0` - Queued
- `1` - Processing
- `2` - Failed
- `3` - Published (Ready)

post.description: Create a new project with transcoding settings

get.description: Get a list of all projects

post.description:
Create a new channel with videos and/or projects.
At least one `videoKey` or `projectKey` must be provided.

videoKeys.description: Array of video keys to include

projectKeys.description: Array of project keys to include

message.example: Provide at least one videoKey or projectKey.

post.description:
Create a new live stream.

### Available Regions for Live Streaming
- `use` - US East
- `euc` - Europe
- `sgp` - Singapore
- `ind` - India

post.description:
Retrieve analytics data for videos.

**Important:** This endpoint uses `stats.dyntube.com` as the base URL.

schema.description: Filter by username containing the keyword

get.description:
Get list of plans for your account.
Use the `type` value when creating projects or uploading videos.

clientUserId.description: Custom user ID set by your system
